sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9511" key="a)ntariqmhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντᾰριθμ-ητέον</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑκάστῳ σταγόνι τοὺς ἴσους [ὀδόντας]</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:93" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.93</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
